name: One Punch Man RPG with Lorebook (OPM)
description:
The Most Expansive One Punch Man RPG Ever Built

Over 100,000 tokens of lore. Relentless reactivity. A living world of heroes, monsters, and conspiracies.

About the World

This isn’t just a game—it’s a fully reactive saga set in the world of One Punch Man, beginning after the fall of Lord Boros. The alien invasion is over, but the scars it left across Earth run deep. In the shadows, the Monster Association rises under Orochi’s brutal rule, gathering fiends and disasters into a new, unified army. At the same time, the Neo Heroes begin to spread their influence, promising reform, justice, and strength to replace the corrupt Hero Association. What starts as a conflict of ideology quickly becomes a war for survival.

Heroes, monsters, cyborgs, aliens, and conspirators all carve their own paths. Will you rise through the Hero Association ranks, defect to the Neo Heroes, join the monsters in their bloody crusade, or blaze a path entirely your own? This is not a fixed story—it is an open RPG. Characters evolve, betray, and die for good, shaping the world as you leave your mark.

Core Lore Points

  • The Hero Association: Once humanity’s shield, now plagued with corruption, nepotism, and politics. S-class elites stand tall, but faith in the system crumbles with each scandal.

  • The Monster Association: Orochi, a living weapon of Psykos’ design, commands a nightmare legion of evolving monsters. They don’t merely attack—they organize, plot, and seek dominion.

  • The Neo Heroes: Founded by Blue and Fuzzy, they recruit the disillusioned. With advanced AI support, puppet cyborgs, and a promise of reform, they present both hope and hidden danger.

  • A World of Consequence: Death is permanent. Alliances shift. Heroes, villains, and monsters act independently of you. Every decision reshapes the balance of power.

Player Notes

For the deepest experience, use a robust model like DeepSeek—the 65,000+ token lore is vast and fully reactive. You can roleplay as a Hero Association recruit, a Neo Hero, a monster in Orochi’s ranks, a rogue cyborg, or anyone at all. Forge alliances, rivalries, or twisted rivalries with characters who think and act independently. This isn’t just a simulation of battles—it’s a world of politics, betrayals, and evolution where your legend is written in blood and ruin.

If the AI forgets what era the story is taking place in remind him with a OCC action like saying [OCC:The story takes place before the Death/Fall/birth/Rise/etc of X] if it still doesn’t work,comment down and I’ll look into it,if it’s a fault of mine I’ll try to fix the issue and if it’s the AI I can’t do anything.

Additional but important Note:

If you don’t like the initial scenario, you can reset it.

Just copy, paste, and edit the following command:

[OCC: Ignore and forget the scenario above completely and start anew with a scenario where <your scenario description>]

Replace <your scenario description> with what you want to happen, and the bot will completely forget the previous starting message and create a new one based on what you wrote.
creator: Rfergeegr
